ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data entry */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock for the day */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock for the day */,
  "volume" REAL /* Total volume of stocks traded */,
  "open_interest" INTEGER /* Open interest in the market */,
  "predictions" REAL /* Predicted price based on analytics */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the data is from */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the prices are denominated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Data source (e.g., API, manual input) */,
  "data_validity" INTEGER /* Data validity for analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of the instrument (e.g., Stock, ETF, Index) */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol used for trading */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Primary stock exchange where the instrument is listed */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the instrument */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the instrument */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* URL of the company's website */,
  "company_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traders" (
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trader */,
  "trader_name" TEXT /* Full name of the trader */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the trader */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the trader (e.g., Analyst, Trader, Admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the trader joined the firm */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the trader */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the trader */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the trader (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data this prediction is based on */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted price for the financial instrument */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date of the prediction */,
  "prediction_method" TEXT /* Method or algorithm used to generate the prediction */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "predicted_date" TEXT /* Date for which the prediction is made */,
  "actual_price" REAL /* Actual price on the predicted date (for validation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading session */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader conducting the session */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument being traded */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the trading session */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., Buy, Sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of stocks traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the transaction occurred */,
  "session_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trading session */,
  "session_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trading session */,
  "session_profit_loss" REAL /* Profit or loss from the session */,
  "session_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_sessions_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_sessions_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader who created the alert */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument related to the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., Price Increase, Price Decrease) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Price threshold for triggering the alert */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was created */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., Active, Triggered, Dismissed) */,
  "alert_priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the alert (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert (e.g., Daily, Weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert that triggered the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., Sent, Read, Unread) */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., Email, SMS) */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., Alert, Update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_notifications_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indexes" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the market index (e.g., S&P 500) */,
  "index_value" REAL /* Current value of the index */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the index value was last updated */,
  "index_exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the index is listed */,
  "index_sector" TEXT /* Sector the index represents */,
  "index_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "performance_metric" TEXT /* Type of performance metric (e.g., Return, Volatility) */,
  "performance_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance data */,
  "performance_source" TEXT /* Source of the performance data (e.g., API, Manual) */,
  "performance_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the performance metric */,
  "performance_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the performance data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_performance_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)
